message:
fix(fj-trace): reject zero/malformed ReduceWindow strides at trace-time

ReduceWindow shape inference used filter_map to parse window_dimensions
and window_strides, silently dropping invalid tokens and allowing zero
values that cause div_ceil(0) panic at line 1761.

Changes:
- Replace filter_map with strict parsing that returns TraceError for
  invalid tokens
- Validate window_dimensions and window_strides lengths match input rank
- Reject zero values in both window_dimensions and window_strides
- Add 5 regression tests for zero, malformed, short, and valid params

Fixes: frankenjax-8wvy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
